Rain_Spike.NAME: Rain
Rain_Spike.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. If you have 3 or more Flow, gain !M! Block instead.

HeavyMetalQueen_Spike.NAME: Heavy Metal Queen
HeavyMetalQueen_Spike.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. Increased by !M! for each Flow you have.

SympathyForTheDevil_Spike.NAME: Sympathy for the Devil
SympathyForTheDevil_Spike.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. Heal !M! HP. If you have 5 or more Flow, heal 5 HP instead.

CowboyFunk_Spike.NAME: Cowboy Funk
CowboyFunk_Spike.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage !M! times. If you have 3 or more Flow, hit 1 additional time.

MushroomHunting_Spike.NAME: Mushroom Hunting
MushroomHunting_Spike.DESCRIPTION: Gain !M! Flow. Draw 1 card. NL Exhaust.

JupiterJazz_Spike.NAME: Jupiter Jazz
JupiterJazz_Spike.DESCRIPTION: At the end of your turn, gain !M! Strength. NL (1 extra while you have 6 or more Flow.)

AsteroidBlues_Spike.NAME: Asteroid Blues
AsteroidBlues_Spike.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. If this is the first card you play this turn, gain !M! Flow.

MyFunnyValentine_Spike.NAME: My Funny Valentine
MyFunnyValentine_Spike.DESCRIPTION: Retain. NL Gain !M! Block for each Flow you have.

GoodnightJulia_Spike.NAME: Goodnight Julia
GoodnightJulia_Spike.DESCRIPTION: Lose 3 HP. Gain !M! Flow. Draw 1 card.

CallMeCallMe_Spike.NAME: Call Me Call Me
CallMeCallMe_Spike.DESCRIPTION: Add a copy of a random card from your discard pile to your hand. Gain !M! Flow.

Bang_Spike.NAME: Bang.
Bang_Spike.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage, plus !M! damage per Flow. Lose all Flow. NL At the start of your next turn, lose half your current HP. NL Exhaust.
Bang_Spike.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage, plus !M! damage per Flow. Lose all Flow. NL At the start of your next turn, if any enemy is alive, you die. NL Exhaust.

BalladOfFallenAngels_Spike.NAME: Ballad of Fallen Angels
BalladOfFallenAngels_Spike.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies. Gain !M! Flow.

Tank_Spike.NAME: Tank!
Tank_Spike.DESCRIPTION: At the start of your turn, gain !M! Flow.

TheRealFolkBlues_Spike.NAME: The Real Folk Blues
TheRealFolkBlues_Spike.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies. Draw !M! cards. Gain 2 Flow.

SpaceLion_Spike.NAME: Space Lion
SpaceLion_Spike.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you lose HP, gain !M! Strength.

JammingWithEdward_Spike.NAME: Jamming with Edward
JammingWithEdward_Spike.DESCRIPTION: Gain Flow equal to the number of cards in your hand. Draw !M! cards. NL Exhaust.

GottaKnockALittleHarder_Spike.NAME: Gotta Knock a Little Harder
GottaKnockALittleHarder_Spike.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. Damage is doubled while you are at or below half HP.

AskDNA_Spike.NAME: Ask DNA
AskDNA_Spike.DESCRIPTION: Your next Attack this turn is played twice. NL Exhaust.
AskDNA_Spike.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Your next Attack this turn is played twice.

RoadToTheWest_Spike.NAME: Road to the West
RoadToTheWest_Spike.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage, plus !M! damage per Flow. Lose all Flow.

AveMaria_Spike.NAME: Ave Maria
AveMaria_Spike.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. If you have 5 or more Flow, deal !M! damage instead. NL Exhaust.

Blue_Spike.NAME: Blue
Blue_Spike.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you play a card, gain !M! Flow.
